title: The Battle for Syrup Village Escalates
description: On pages 9–12, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: OH! Isn't that the Ojousama of the mansion?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: She's the target of the mission!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Then... We don't have to go to the village?!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: If we can just kill her now...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Maybe you can't forgive me so easily, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Didn't I tell you to run away?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: These pirates are after your life!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And yet you're here fighting, even with those wounds...

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
